etymology.description: 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") + 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") = a foot on a boat moving forward -> phonetic for 前(前) (qián, "forward")
etymology.interpretation: The character 歬 is a historical variant for 前(前) (qián, "forward"), combining 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") and 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") to depict moving forward on a boat. It also served as a phonetic element for the character 剪(剪) (jiǎn, "to cut").
